_notes.lodesYear: Latest available LODES8 year (2021 as of 2024)
_notes.topN: Max commute pairs to include (candidate pool is larger before dest cap)
_notes.minCommuters: Minimum daily commuters to consider a pair
_notes.bounds: Optional lat/lng bounding box — pairs with any centroid outside are excluded
_notes.maxPairsPerDest: Optional cap on how many pairs can share the same destination tract
